title: Design System: César A. Nogueira Portfolio

display.purpose: Hero name only. One instance per page.

headline.purpose: Section h2 headings. Max-width 3xl. text-wrap: balance.

label.purpose: Mono data labels: scores, timestamps, status. Uppercase ≤4 words.

ui.purpose: Nav links, footer, metadata. Hanken Grotesk distinct from editorial stack.

shadows.name: accent-glow-blue
shadows.purpose: Hover on primary CTA buttons and active Hiring Assistant button.

shadows.name: verdict-glow-green
shadows.purpose: Verdict card in recruiter scanner. Sole decorative shadow; communicates positive outcome.

motion.name: ease-spring
motion.purpose: Entrance animations: panels, overlays, CTAs sliding in.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary CTA. Blue fill, white text, 6px radius. Opacity transition on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #3b82f6; color: #fff; font-family: 'Geist', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.011em; padding: 12px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.12s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3b82f6; outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary CTA alongside a primary. Hairline border, no fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: transparent; color: #edf0f3; font-family: 'Geist', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.011em; padding: 12px 24px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.13); border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.12s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3b82f6; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Scanner Trigger
components.description: The Evaluate Cesar button. Green-tinted, monospace, pulse ring on idle.
components.css: .ds-btn-scanner { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; background: rgba(52,211,153,0.05); color: #34d399; font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 10px 20px; border: 1px solid rgba(52,211,153,0.4); border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.15s, background 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; } .ds-btn-scanner:hover { border-color: rgba(52,211,153,0.7); background: rgba(52,211,153,0.1); box-shadow: 0 0 16px -6px rgba(52,211,153,0.4); } .ds-scanner-dot { position: relative; width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: #34d399; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-scanner-dot::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 50%; background: #34d399; opacity: 0.5; animation: ds-ping 1.8s ease-out infinite; } @keyframes ds-ping { 0% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.5; } 100% { transform: scale(2.5); opacity: 0; } }

components.name: Panel Card
components.description: Standard content container. Dark surface-base bg, hairline border, no shadow at rest.
components.html:
Cloud Architecture

Multi-cloud across GCP, AWS, Azure and OCI for regulated enterprise.
components.css: .ds-panel { background: #0e1014; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-radius: 12px; padding: 28px; } .ds-panel-label { font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.2em; color: #788490; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-panel-body { font-family: 'Geist', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.6; color: #97a1ad; margin: 0; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form field. Transparent bg, hairline border, blue focus glow.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-input-label { font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.18em; color: #788490; } .ds-input { background: transparent; color: #edf0f3; font-family: 'Geist', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; padding: 12px 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-radius: 6px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.12s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #788490; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #3b82f6; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(59,130,246,0.15); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3b82f6; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Tech Tag (chip)
components.description: Technology name tag. Monospace, no border-radius. Data, not badge.
components.css: .ds-chip-tech { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #788490; background: transparent; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-radius: 0; padding: 2px 8px; }

components.name: Role Chip
components.description: Role fit signal in the hiring scanner. Green-tinted pill.
components.css: .ds-chip-role { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #34d399; background: rgba(52,211,153,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(52,211,153,0.25); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 4px 12px; }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Fixed top nav. Hanken Grotesk 13px, progress bar, language dropdown, availability pill.
components.html:
CN
ImpactStories
Available
components.css: .ds-nav { position: fixed; top: 0; inset-inline: 0; height: 56px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 24px; background: rgba(8,9,12,0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; z-index: 50; } .ds-nav-logo { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #edf0f3; text-decoration: none; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 24px; } .ds-nav-link { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #788490; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.12s; } .ds-nav-link:hover, .ds-nav-link--active { color: #edf0f3; } .ds-nav-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-nav-available { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: rgba(52,211,153,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(52,211,153,0.3); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 4px 10px; font-size: 10px; font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #34d399; } .ds-nav-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: #34d399; animation: ds-ping 2.4s ease-out infinite; }

components.name: Hiring Verdict Card
components.description: The 'Proceed to Interview' card in the recruiter scanner. Green glow. The most important single element in the system.
components.html:
Hire Recommendation

Proceed to Interview

Overall FitStrong MatchRisk LevelLowAvailabilityNow
components.css: .ds-verdict { border: 2px solid rgba(52,211,153,0.4); border-radius: 16px; background: rgba(52,211,153,0.05); padding: 28px; text-align: center; box-shadow: 0 0 40px -12px rgba(52,211,153,0.3); } .ds-verdict-label { font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.28em; color: rgba(52,211,153,0.7); margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-verdict-headline { font-family: 'Inter Tight', sans-serif; font-size: clamp(2rem,5vw,3rem); font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #34d399; margin: 0 0 20px; } .ds-verdict-meta { display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; gap: 24px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(52,211,153,0.15); padding-top: 16px; } .ds-verdict-stat { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; } .ds-verdict-stat-label { font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 9px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.18em; color: #788490; } .ds-verdict-stat-value { font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #34d399; } .ds-verdict-divider { width: 1px; height: 32px; background: rgba(52,211,153,0.2); }

narrative.overview:
This is a briefing document, not a portfolio. The visual system serves someone who has been in production at 3am and knows exactly what a system costs when it fails. Every design decision defers to evidence: specific numbers, named clients, concrete outcomes. Nothing decorates what can instead inform.

The aesthetic comes from technical artifacts — incident reports, architecture decision records, cloud billing dashboards — translated into a premium dark surface. The tension between the precision of monospace labels and the editorial weight of Inter Tight headlines is intentional: engineer by training, communicator by necessity.

This system explicitly rejects: SaaS landing-page templates; AI portfolio syndrome (symmetric card grids, gradient badges, dashboard-widget credibility signals); generic consultant sites with buzzword headlines; over-designed portfolios that put the tool before the person.
keyCharacteristics: Four fonts, four roles: display (Inter Tight), body (Geist), mono (Geist Mono), UI/nav (Hanken Grotesk)
Three accent colors with distinct semantic roles: blue (action/architecture), cyan (platform/data), orange (FinOps/cost)
Green reserved exclusively for availability signals and positive verdicts
Hairline borders at 7% opacity — structure without noise

rules.name: The Domain-Color Rule
rules.body: Each accent maps to one technical domain: blue for cloud architecture, cyan for platform engineering and data, orange for FinOps and cost. Never use all three on the same element.

rules.name: The Green Reservation Rule
rules.body: Availability green (#34d399) appears only when the system is making a positive declaration: 'available now', 'proceed to interview', 'strong match', 'low risk'. The moment it appears on decorative elements, it loses the authority that makes it credible.

rules.name: The Mono-Label Rule
rules.body: Monospace is not 'technical atmosphere.' Every mono element carries a specific data class: a timestamp, a score, a category key, a terminal command, a status string. Decorative mono is prohibited.

rules.name: The Four-Family Ceiling
rules.body: Inter Tight (display) + Geist (body) + Geist Mono (data) + Hanken Grotesk (UI nav) is the full font budget. No new families. If a design decision requires a fifth font, it requires a removal instead.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Every surface is flat at rest. The moment a shadow appears on a card just to look elevated, the system breaks. Shadows are semantic signals, not decoration. If a design choice requires a shadow, ask what state it communicates first.

dos: Do use Inter Tight for all display headings at -0.02em tracking minimum.
Do use monospace (Geist Mono) only for data-class content: scores, timestamps, status labels, terminal commands, identifiers.
Do deploy the three accents by domain: blue for architecture/action, cyan for platform/data, orange for FinOps/cost.
Do reserve availability green (#34d399) for exactly two contexts: the 'Available' status signal and positive hiring verdicts.
Do use text-wrap: balance on all h2 section headings and text-wrap: pretty on prose paragraphs.
Do wrap position:fixed overlays in plain div containers with no CSS filter, transform, or perspective on ancestors.
Do name clients and outcomes. 'AndBank, Santander, LATAM Airlines' beats 'major enterprise clients'.
donts: Don't use SaaS landing-page templates: symmetric card grids, gradient badges, dashboard-widget credibility signals, fake terminal boot sequences.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Single solid color for all text.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as colored accent stripes.
Don't pair border: 1px solid with box-shadow blur > 8px on the same element.
Don't add a fifth font family.
Don't use border-radius above 16px on cards or containers.
Don't use green for anything except availability status and positive verdicts.
Don't use em dashes. Commas, colons, semicolons, periods, or parentheses instead.
Don't wrap position:fixed overlays in motion/react m.div elements that animate filter or blur.
Don't animate opacity to 0 on components that conditionally render in React 18 concurrent mode.
